title: spermacoce neovirgata
intro: Spermacoce neovirgata, also known as the African fever grass, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Spermacoce neovirgata include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or it can be used to make a decoction by boiling the roots and leaves in water.
